extraction.one_line_summary: POGAČAR won with a late attack inside final kilometer, but VINGEGAARD marked it easily and limited losses to just 4 seconds despite no teammates.
tactical_patterns: VINGEGAARD conserved energy by sitting on McNulty's wheel all final two climbs instead of sharing pace, defensive masterclass
POGAČAR waited until steepest 20%+ gradient at 300m to attack, terrain-specific timing failed against superior form
VAN AERT clinched green jersey at intermediate sprint then Jumbo-Visma immediately shifted 100% focus to yellow jersey defense
McNulty age 24 paced final two climbs alone for POGAČAR, UAE tactical gamble failed to crack VINGEGAARD

rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: positive: defended yellow with zero teammates on final two climbs, never showed weakness when Pogačar attacked steep gradient
rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: negative: won stage but only gained 4 seconds despite McNulty's pacing and attacking at optimal 20% gradient
rider_signals.McNulty Brandon: positive: 24-year-old set ferocious pace on final two climbs solo, won most aggressive rider, emerging as UAE's super-domestique
rider_signals.VAN AART Wout: positive: secured green jersey mathematically at intermediate sprint mid-stage, freed Jumbo-Visma to ignore sprint duties
rider_signals.MÁJA Rafal: negative: abandoned at start due to chain snap injury from previous stage, Pogačar lost key climbing support
